description: Add dashboard UI for round-robin proxy groups within the existing Proxy Pools page. The UI should be intuitive: a new section/tab for 'Proxy Groups' within the proxy-pools page, where users can create/edit/delete groups, assign proxy pools to groups, configure mode (roundrobin vs sticky), set sticky limit, and assign groups to providers/connections. Also add the 'Remove All Proxy' bulk action button. The UX must clearly show which providers use which group, support the check-before-change logic (when changing proxy assignment, verify current state matches expected default before overriding custom assignments), and remain within the existing Proxy Pool menu.
steps: Step 1: Extend the proxy-pools dashboard page (src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/proxy-pools/page.tsx) with a tabbed layout: Tab 1 = 'Proxy Pools' (existing pool list), Tab 2 = 'Round-Robin Groups' (new group management). Use existing shadcn/ui components (Tabs from radix-ui or a simple segmented control).

Step 2: In the 'Round-Robin Groups' tab, add: a list of groups showing name, mode badge (roundrobin/sticky), member pool count, bound provider/connection count, active status. Each group row has edit/delete actions. An 'Add Group' button opens a modal/dialog.

Step 3: Create the group form dialog with fields: Name (input), Mode (select: roundrobin/sticky), Sticky Limit (number input, shown only when mode=sticky), Strict Proxy (switch), Active (switch). Also a multi-select for proxy pools (show active pools from the pools list with checkboxes, drag-to-reorder for priority).

Step 4: In the 'Provider Proxy Bindings' section (already exists at bottom of page), extend the per-connection proxy select dropdown to include proxy groups as a separate optgroup above individual pools. The select options should be: 'Use provider default / none', then optgroup 'Round-Robin Groups' with group entries, then optgroup 'Individual Pools' with pool entries.

Step 5: Add a 'Remove All Proxy Assignments' button (with confirmation dialog) that calls POST /api/proxy-groups/[id]/remove-all for the selected group, or a global variant that clears ALL proxy/group assignments from all connections. This button should be prominent with a destructive variant.

Step 6: Implement the check-before-change logic in the provider binding UI: before changing a connection's proxy assignment, compare the current assignment to the provider-level default. If they differ (meaning the current assignment was custom-set by the user), show a warning/confirmation: 'This account has a custom proxy assignment. Changing will override it. Continue?'. Only bulk 'Remove All' bypasses this check.
Step 7: Add proper loading states, error handling, success notifications (using existing useNotificationStore), and i18n translate() calls for all new strings.
acceptance_criteria: Proxy Pools page has two tabs: 'Proxy Pools' and 'Round-Robin Groups'
Users can create, edit, and delete proxy groups with mode, sticky limit, and pool membership
Provider proxy bindings dropdown shows both groups and individual pools in separate optgroups
Remove All button clears all proxy assignments for a group or globally
Check-before-change logic warns when overriding a custom per-account assignment
All new UI strings use translate() for i18n
No regressions in existing proxy pool functionality
findings: All verification steps passed (lint, typecheck, test, build). 189 test files pass (1072 tests). Implemented: tabbed layout (Proxy Pools / Round-Robin Groups), group CRUD with form dialog, enhanced provider bindings with optgroups for groups and individual pools, remove-all dialog, check-before-change confirmation logic, pool member multi-select via Checkbox, and account overrides display now limited to 3 with count. SelectLabel import added for optgroup headers. queryKeys.ts and useInvalidate.ts extended with proxyGroups.
